scripts.lint:eslint: eslint app components lib eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run check:architecture && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify:knowledge-base:sqlite: cross-env EDUMAILAI_MAILBOX_ADAPTER=sqlite EDUMAILAI_KNOWLEDGE_BASE_ADAPTER=sqlite EDUMAILAI_ACTIVITY_ADAPTER=sqlite EDUMAILAI_FILE_STORAGE_ADAPTER=local node scripts/verify-knowledge-base-workflow.mjs
scripts.verify:knowledge-base:adapters: npm run verify:knowledge-base:json-file && npm run verify:knowledge-base:sqlite && npm run verify:knowledge-base:database
scripts.verify:adapter-modes: npm run verify && npm run verify:knowledge-base:adapters && npm run build:json-file && npm run build:sqlite && npm run build:database
